AI Solutions Company Oman

AI Solutions Built for Oman's Operational Priorities

Document & Workflow Intelligence

Extract, classify, verify and route information from contracts, forms, invoices, applications and regulatory documents.

Arabic & English AI Assistants

Secure employee, citizen and customer assistants using approved organisational knowledge.

Asset & Maintenance Intelligence

Use equipment, sensor and maintenance data to forecast failures and prioritise inspections.

Logistics & Supply-Chain Intelligence

Improve route planning, shipment forecasting, inventory visibility and exception management.

Decision Intelligence

Transform operational and business data into forecasts, alerts and natural-language analytics.

Computer Vision

Detect defects, unsafe conditions, equipment anomalies and process deviations from approved image or video sources.

Financial Risk Intelligence

Apply AI to KYC processing, fraud detection, transaction anomalies, credit assessment and regulatory reporting.

Energy & Sustainability Analytics

Optimise energy use, emissions and asset efficiency using operational, meter and sensor data.

Data Foundations & MLOps

Build clean data pipelines, feature stores and monitoring so AI stays reliable in production.

Delivery Process

How We Take AI From Opportunity to Operation

01

Discover

We clarify the business challenge, users, available data and expected outcome.

Output: Prioritised AI use case

02

Plan

We define the solution, architecture, delivery scope and success measures.

Output: Practical implementation roadmap

03

Build

We develop, test and integrate the AI solution with existing workflows.

Output: Validated production-ready solution

04

Launch

We deploy, monitor and transfer knowledge to the internal team.

Output: Governed AI system in operation

Case Studies

AI Solutions Designed Around Oman's Operating Environment

Ports & logistics

Duqm Axis Logistics

AI-Assisted Shipment Exception Management

ChallengeTeams manually combined vessel, shipment and gate information from separate systems, making disruptions hard to catch early.

SolutionA unified operational data workflow with AI-generated exception alerts and concise shipment summaries for operations managers.

OutcomeEarlier visibility into shipment risks, fewer repetitive status checks and more consistent handovers between shifts.

View Logistics AI Case Study →
Manufacturing

Sohar Forge Industries

Predictive Maintenance for Critical Equipment

ChallengeMaintenance relied on fixed schedules, manual inspections and service records stored across disconnected systems.

SolutionA predictive-maintenance model combining equipment history, operating conditions and inspection records to prioritise assets needing attention.

OutcomeClearer inspection priorities, improved equipment-risk visibility and reduced dependence on reactive maintenance.

View Industrial AI Case Study →
Banking & finance

Muscat Meridian Finance

Arabic and English KYC Document Intelligence

ChallengeOnboarding teams manually reviewed identity documents, application forms and records across Arabic and English submissions.

SolutionA document-intelligence workflow that extracted information, flagged missing fields and routed uncertain cases to authorised employees.

OutcomeA faster, more consistent review process while retaining human control over onboarding decisions.

View Financial AI Case Study →
Tourism & hospitality

Dhofar Vista Hospitality

AI Guest Service and Demand Forecasting

ChallengeSeasonal demand created high enquiry volumes and made staffing and occupancy planning difficult.

SolutionA bilingual guest-service assistant combined with a demand-forecasting model using booking patterns and seasonal data.

OutcomeGuests received faster answers while management gained better visibility into expected demand and staffing.

View Hospitality AI Case Study →

FAQ

AI Consulting Company Oman — FAQs

Talk it through in 15 minutes

Ask about scope, cost, data protection, hosting or where to start — and leave with a clear next step.

Book a Free Call →
What services does an AI consulting company in Oman provide?

Opportunity assessment, strategy, custom development, integration, governance and managed support — from business case to governed production.

How do we identify the right first AI use case?

We score candidates by operational value, data readiness, feasibility and risk, then recommend the strongest starting point.

Does Codezal provide both AI consulting and development?

Yes. Strategy, engineering, integration and governance are delivered by one accountable team.

Can AI integrate with our existing ERP or CRM?

Yes. We connect through approved APIs, data pipelines and event flows without replacing your core systems.

Can Codezal build Arabic and English AI applications?

Yes. We build bilingual assistants and document intelligence using your approved, source-linked knowledge.

Can AI solutions be deployed on-premise?

Yes. On-premise, private cloud, Oman-hosted cloud or hybrid, depending on your requirements.

How is sensitive organisational data protected?

Through access control, data classification, auditability, human oversight and data-residency-aware architecture.

How long does an enterprise AI pilot take?

Typically a few weeks to a few months, depending on data access and integration scope.

Can Codezal review an existing AI pilot?

Yes. We assess data, model, architecture, governance and integration barriers, then define a route to production.

Does Codezal provide AI governance and knowledge transfer?

Yes. Governance is built into delivery, and we enable your team through pairing, documentation and training.
